meta.title: Ömer Çelik
meta.description: Independent engineer working on AI-driven, spec-driven architecture — libraries and platforms for enterprises, and products that make real work simpler.

home.subtitle: Software engineer building open-source developer infrastructure — AI-native, spec-driven golden paths and composable .NET libraries. I care about architecture, correctness, and tools that make the right thing the default.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who I am and what I work on.
about.body: I'm Ömer — a software engineer. I build open-source developer infrastructure: AI-native, spec-driven golden paths and composable .NET libraries, where precise specifications become correct, testable systems and AI works inside the guardrails. I care about architecture, correctness, and tools that make the right thing the default. This is a placeholder bio — edit it in the message files to say exactly what you want, in every language.

contact.subtitle: Questions, ideas, or feedback on the work — my inbox is open. I read everything.
